description_long: This jewelry piece consists of two ornate elements displayed within a glossy black square case. The larger element is a starburst or floral-shaped pendant, richly adorned with numerous small gemstones in various colors, and features a prominent central white cabochon. The smaller element is a matching circular piece, also set with a central white cabochon and surrounded by a delicate border of stones. Both pieces are set in a gold-toned metal, with intricate filigree and decorative patterns visible throughout. The pendant includes a visible loop or bail, suggesting it is designed to be worn on a chain. The overall presentation is luxurious and highly decorative, with a strong emphasis on intricate craftsmanship and sparkling embellishments.
description: An ornate gold-toned pendant and matching circular piece, both set with central white cabochons and surrounded by colorful gemstones, displayed in a glossy black case.
description_view_0: Front view showing the starburst pendant and smaller circular piece side by side, highlighting the central cabochons and gemstone detailing.
description_view_1: View from the opposite side, emphasizing the pendant's loop and the alignment of the two pieces, with the cabochons more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view with the pendant's bail and filigree work more visible, and the arrangement of gemstones around the central stones clearly seen.
description_view_3: Side view showing the depth of the cabochons and the raised, intricate surfaces of both jewelry pieces.
